overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a misty river at dawn, then panning for gold at a riverside camp. The scene features atmospheric fog, detailed natural wilderness, and cooperative interaction with an NPC companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with misty mountain backdrop

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into the shallow river water
character crouches down to fill the metal bucket with river water

agents.ego_description: wading through the misty river carrying a metal bucket toward the opposite shore

notable_agents.action: dark horse standing on the riverbank watching the character enter the water

entered.detail: calm flowing river with gentle current and morning mist reflections
pebble and stone riverbank with scattered vegetation
rocky shore where the horse stands
tall evergreen trees lining the riverbank
dense forest on the opposite bank
fog-shrouded mountain peaks visible through the morning haze

segments.scene_description: The character wades into a misty river at dawn, surrounded by dense pine forests and fog-shrouded mountains. A horse stands watch on the rocky shore as the character fills a metal bucket with river water, the camera following in a smooth third-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside gold panning station with campfire

events.description: character exits the river onto the rocky gravel shore
character sits down at the wooden panning station

agents.ego_description: approaching the gold panning station and preparing to work

notable_agents.action: horse walking along the shoreline following the character

entered.detail: wooden trough structure with metal basin for gold panning
small campfire with smoke rising from the stones
metal pail filled with river water carried by the character

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the river onto a gravel shore where a wooden gold panning station is set up next to a small campfire. The horse follows along the bank as the character approaches the station and sits down to begin work.

events.description: character begins the gold panning animation using the wooden trough

agents.ego_description: sitting and panning for gold, sifting through sediment and water in the wooden trough

notable_agents.action: horse standing near the water's edge in the background

entered.detail: dark canvas camping tent with supplies and gear underneath

segments.scene_description: The character sits alone at the panning station, methodically sifting for gold in the wooden trough. The camera pans slightly to reveal a canvas tent set up nearby, while the horse waits patiently by the river and morning mist continues to drift through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: shared gold panning campsite with companion

events.description: second cowboy NPC approaches from the right and sits down at the panning station
NPC begins panning for gold alongside the character

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan for gold while sitting next to the NPC companion

notable_agents.action: cowboy NPC in a beige coat and hat sitting and panning for gold
horse walking along the riverbank behind the two characters

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face rising behind the campsite

segments.scene_description: A second cowboy joins the character at the panning station, sitting down to help sift for gold. The two work side by side in the misty morning, with the horse moving along the shore behind them and a rocky cliff face visible beyond the canvas tent.

scene_state.functional_zone: panning station with expanded camp view

events.description: camera pans left to reveal more of the canvas tent and rocky cliff behind the camp

agents.ego_description: panning for gold while occasionally looking around the campsite and at the companion

notable_agents.action: NPC continuing to pan for gold and looking out at the river

segments.scene_description: The camera pans to show more of the campsite, revealing the canvas tent and rocky cliff face in greater detail. Both characters continue their gold panning work together in the tranquil, foggy riverside setting as the morning light filters through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a solitary dip in a misty river to a collaborative gold-panning effort at a riverside camp. It begins with the character wading through a fog-shrouded river surrounded by pine forests and mountains, while a horse stands watch on the rocky shore. As the character emerges from the water onto a gravel bank, the scene shifts toward a small campfire and a wooden panning station where the character sits to begin sifting. The camera then pans to reveal a nearby canvas tent and a rocky cliff face as a second cowboy joins the effort, with both men working side by side in the drifting morning mist. Finally, the view expands to encompass the full tranquility of the campsite, showing the two characters panning for gold together as the dawn light filters through the trees.
